## Description
<!-- What does this PR do? Why is this change needed? -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking — fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking — adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that breaks existing behaviour)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] 🎨 Style / UI
- [ ] ✅ Tests
- [ ] 📄 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 CI/CD / chore

## Changes Made
<!-- Bullet list of what changed and why -->
-
-

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass locally (`npm run test`)
- [ ] No ESLint errors (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Frontend builds without errors (`npm run build -- --configuration production`)
- [ ] Manually tested in browser

## Screenshots (if UI change)
<!-- Before / after screenshots -->

## Checklist
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat: …`, `fix: …`, etc.)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars added
- [ ] Database migrations added if schema changed
